mapper.delete: DELETE FROM VX_MassMessage WHERE DATEDIFF(day, insertDate, GETDATE()) = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_MassMessage (msgid, create_type, creator, create_time, content, insertDate) VALUES
(#{item.msgid}, #{item.createType}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.content}, GETDATE())
